full_text:
Lü Xun (Changti) 呂巽 (長悌)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Xun (呂巽), styledChangti (長悌), was born in Dongping commandery. Raped the wife of his brother then accused said brother of being unfilial, and succeeded. Lü Xun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
